versions.changelog_entry: Initial release. Quarto PDF production pass covering typography (xelatex + Pagella/Inter/JetBrains Mono), document class swap (book -> scrartcl) with continuous page numbering and running headers/footers, cover page via before-body.tex with metadata table and CONFIDENTIAL banner, Polars print() -> Markdown/great_tables table rendering across notebooks, full Plotly removal from PDF render path with shared matplotlib style file (notebooks/_styles.py) and Abstract Data palette, per-chart fixes for heatmap p6 / line chart p11 / histogram p12 / bar chart p17, figure/table numbering with @fig- cross references, seqsplit path breaks and tcolorbox inline-code backgrounds. Seven required fixes, 10 acceptance criteria, verification commands for schema-row leak and Plotly residue. Stage boundaries and analysis-code untouched.
